title: AI Foundations
tagline: Every learner begins with curiosity, guided by a personal AI Tutor.
description: Skoolage begins every learner the same way: understanding who you are, what you already know, and where AI can help. Foundational literacy, responsible AI use, and a personalized roadmap — before a single lesson is assigned.

pageMeta.title: AI Foundations
pageMeta.description: Personalized AI literacy, prompting fundamentals, and roadmap-building with your Skoolage AI Tutor.

intro.heading: AI Foundations
intro.subHeading: Every Skoolage journey starts here. Your AI Tutor learns who you are, what your profession is, and what you already know — then builds a learning path around it, not a generic curriculum.

capabilities.title: Learner Discovery
capabilities.description: Your AI Tutor asks what you do, what you're curious about, and what's holding you back — before recommending a single lesson.

capabilities.title: AI Literacy
capabilities.description: Plain-language grounding in what AI is, how it works, and where it fits into your daily work.

capabilities.title: Responsible AI Use
capabilities.description: Verification, human oversight, and ethical judgment taught alongside every technical skill.

capabilities.title: Prompting Fundamentals
capabilities.description: Practical prompting patterns you'll actually use, taught through your own profession's examples.

capabilities.title: Skill Assessment
capabilities.description: A quick, low-pressure assessment that identifies strengths and gaps — no exam anxiety, just a starting point.

capabilities.title: Personalized Roadmap
capabilities.description: A learning path built around your goals, pace, and profession, not a fixed syllabus everyone follows.

capabilities.title: AI Tutor Relationship
capabilities.description: The beginning of a continuous relationship — your Tutor remembers your progress and adapts as you grow.

capabilities.title: Professional Context Setting
capabilities.description: Early lessons use examples from your field, whether that's healthcare, law, education, or business.

capabilities.title: Confidence Building
capabilities.description: Structured early wins so learners feel capable within the first sessions, not overwhelmed.

capabilities.title: Community Introduction
capabilities.description: A first connection to the Skoolage learning community — you're joining an institution, not starting alone.

cta.heading: Ready to meet your AI Tutor?
cta.body: Foundations take days, not months. Begin whenever you're ready — there's no enrollment deadline.
cta.label: Begin AI Foundations →

title: Practice & Application
tagline: Knowledge becomes capability through real, professional application.
description: Learning that stays theoretical doesn't change how you work. Every learner applies AI directly within their profession — solving real problems, building real workflows, guided by continuous feedback.

pageMeta.title: Practice & Application
pageMeta.description: Profession-specific Learning Paths, guided exercises, and real-world AI application with continuous AI Tutor feedback.

intro.heading: Practice & Application
intro.subHeading: Skoolage does not stop at explaining concepts. Every learner practices AI within their own profession, turning understanding into a habit that shows up in daily work.

capabilities.title: Profession-Specific Paths
capabilities.description: AI for Business, Healthcare, Law, Education, Finance, and more — each path built around real professional workflows.

capabilities.title: Guided Exercises
capabilities.description: Structured practice tasks that mirror situations learners will actually encounter at work.

capabilities.title: Real-World Projects
capabilities.description: Learners complete practical projects — a business proposal, a lesson plan, a research summary — using AI responsibly.

capabilities.title: Continuous AI Tutor Feedback
capabilities.description: Every exercise is reviewed for understanding, not just correctness, with guidance on what to try next.

capabilities.title: Cross-Disciplinary Exploration
capabilities.description: Learners are encouraged to explore adjacent Learning Paths — an accountant studying entrepreneurship, a teacher studying leadership.

capabilities.title: Workflow Integration
capabilities.description: Practice designed to fit alongside real work rather than requiring learners to step away from their jobs.

capabilities.title: Reflection & Iteration
capabilities.description: Structured reflection after each project: what worked, what to verify, what to improve next time.

capabilities.title: Progress Tracking
capabilities.description: Visible skill development across the Learning Workspace, updated as capability grows.

capabilities.title: Peer Learning
capabilities.description: Community discussions and study groups connect learners working through similar Learning Paths.

capabilities.title: Confidence Through Repetition
capabilities.description: Consistent practice, not one-time exposure, builds the kind of fluency that survives outside the lesson.

cta.heading: Ready to put AI to work in your profession?
cta.body: Practice is personalized to your field — explore the Learning Paths available for what you do.
cta.label: Explore Learning Paths →

title: AI.M Certification
tagline: Recognition for demonstrated capability, not course completion.
description: AI.M (Artificial Intelligence Mastery) recognizes learners who can apply AI responsibly and effectively within their profession. It is not a participation certificate — it is evidence of real capability.

pageMeta.title: AI.M Certification
pageMeta.description: Earn AI.M — Skoolage's signature credential recognizing practical, demonstrated AI capability within your profession.

intro.heading: AI.M Certification
intro.subHeading: AI.M is earned through demonstrated capability — not memorization, not attendance. Learners solve real problems, reflect on their reasoning, and prove they can work responsibly with AI.

capabilities.title: Practical Assessment
capabilities.description: Assessments mirror real professional scenarios — business decisions, patient communication, legal research — not multiple-choice exams.

capabilities.title: AI Is Expected
capabilities.description: Unlike traditional exams, AI use is expected and evaluated: judgment, prompting, and verification matter more than raw recall.

capabilities.title: Responsible AI Standards
capabilities.description: Ethical use, privacy awareness, and human oversight are assessed alongside technical capability.

capabilities.title: Reflection & Reasoning
capabilities.description: Learners explain their choices — why they trusted an output, what they verified, what they'd improve.

capabilities.title: Profession-Specific Tracks
capabilities.description: AI.M for Business, Healthcare, Law, Education, Finance, and more — capability measured within real context.

capabilities.title: Secure Credential Verification
capabilities.description: Graduates can share and verify their AI.M credential with confidence, backed by transparent standards.

capabilities.title: Graduation Ceremony
capabilities.description: Achievement is recognized and celebrated — a meaningful milestone, not a quiet checkbox.

capabilities.title: Lifelong Learning Record
capabilities.description: AI.M becomes part of a growing learning record that expands with future pathways and specializations.

capabilities.title: Alumni Network Entry
capabilities.description: Graduation is the beginning of Alumni Network membership — not the end of the Skoolage relationship.

capabilities.title: Continuous Standards
capabilities.description: As AI evolves, AI.M evolves — credential integrity is protected through consistent, transparent evaluation.

cta.heading: Ready to demonstrate your AI capability?
cta.body: AI.M recognizes what you can actually do. Start the certification pathway whenever your Learning Path is ready.
cta.label: Explore AI.M →

title: Enterprise Learning
tagline: Building AI-capable workforces, one learner at a time.
description: Organizations do not become AI-powered by purchasing tools. They become AI-powered when their people know how to use them. Skoolage helps companies build that capability across every department.

pageMeta.title: Enterprise Learning
pageMeta.description: Workforce AI literacy, department-specific Learning Paths, and AI.M certification for organizations building AI-ready teams.

intro.heading: Enterprise Learning
intro.subHeading: Skoolage Enterprise helps organizations build AI-capable teams through personalized learning, department-specific pathways, and measurable workforce transformation.

capabilities.title: Workforce AI Assessment
capabilities.description: Understand current AI literacy across the organization before designing a rollout.

capabilities.title: Department-Specific Learning Paths
capabilities.description: Sales, marketing, finance, HR, and engineering each receive learning tailored to their real workflows.

capabilities.title: Workforce Dashboard
capabilities.description: Leaders see participation, progress, and capability growth across teams — without micromanaging individuals.

capabilities.title: Learning Assignment
capabilities.description: Structured programs like 'All employees complete AI Foundations' or 'Marketing completes AI for Marketing.'

capabilities.title: AI.M Enterprise Certification
capabilities.description: Recognized capability standards across the workforce, building a shared language for AI readiness.

capabilities.title: Executive AI Strategy
capabilities.description: Leadership-focused learning on AI strategy, decision-making, and organizational transformation.

capabilities.title: Continuous Capability Building
capabilities.description: Training that evolves with AI itself — not a one-time workshop that goes stale within a year.

capabilities.title: Data & Privacy Standards
capabilities.description: Enterprise learning built on clear data protection, secure access, and responsible analytics.

capabilities.title: Change Management Support
capabilities.description: Guidance for rolling out AI adoption without creating fear or resistance among employees.

capabilities.title: Long-Term Partnership
capabilities.description: Skoolage remains a learning partner well past the initial rollout, evolving alongside your organization.

cta.heading: Ready to build an AI-ready workforce?
cta.body: We work with organizations of every size to design a rollout that fits their teams and timeline.
cta.label: Talk to Our Enterprise Team →
